full_text: Rabada to Haris Rauf, Haris Rauf Run Out!! 2 runs completed. Quite an exhilarating finish to the innings. Haris Rauf gets a top edge on his pull shot towards square leg, and it just manages to elude the fielder who was sprinting back. Klaasen collects the ball and parries it to the bowler's end. Bavuma fumbles on his first attempt to grab the ball, but he somehow manages to dislodge the bails despite that fumble. Rauf is well short of his crease.

full_text: Ngidi to Babar Azam, Caught by Rabada!! You can't keep Rabada out of the game, not with the ball, not in the field as well. Oh! what an athlete this man is and Babar has been put out of his misery. Was another slower ball outside off - Babar spotted it and went for the slog over mid-wicket, got too far under the delivery, as a result, there was plenty of height and no real distance. Rabada still had plenty of work to do, ran back from mid-on, kept his eyes on the ball all along and completed the two-handed catch even as it was lobbing over his left shoulder. Top top catch and Pakistan find themselves in some bother.

A sublime cameo, but it ends as a cameo - Nortje kept his wits around, kept it full and straight, Haris was looking to access the short boundary, went right across on the flick and missed. Was looking extremely dangerous, but his knock comes to an end. .

full_text: Shaheen Afridi to Rossouw, Caught by Naseem Shah!! With that wicket, the two destructive left-hander South African batters are back to the pavilion. Not the kind of start SA wanted while chasing a target close to 190.
